message:
fix(ui): prevent Start() from appearing to succeed after Stop()

Start() now checks if state==WorkerStopped and returns an error.
Previously, calling Start() after Stop() would return nil (appearing
to succeed) but the worker would be dead because processLoop had
already exited.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
